Chapter I
The white series
"

Two people,
one story,
forever unfolding.

The detail

She extended her hand — and in that single gesture, a whole future came into focus. Every love story has its symbol.

The ring.
The promise.
The beginning.

Held close and shown to the world — the quiet confidence of two people who have chosen each other completely.
